mapper.insert: INSERT INTO XBOLTDLM.CALLBACK_MST ( CallBackKey, RegDate, RegTime, ReqNum, ReqNm, AgentID, AgentNm, CallYn, CallRet, DelYn, CreationTime, Creator, LastUpdated, LastUser ) SELECT A.CallBackKey, A.RegDate, -- YYYYMMDD 형식 A.RegTime, -- HHMMSS 형식 A.TelNum AS ReqNum, B.Name AS ReqNm, A.AgentID, C.CC_USER_NAME AS AgentNm, 'N', COALESCE(A.CallRet, '02'), 'N', CONVERT(DATETIME, A.RegDate, 112) AS CreationTime, C.CC_USR_EMP_NO AS Creator, CONVERT(DATETIME, A.RegDate, 112) AS LastUpdated, C.CC_USR_EMP_NO AS LastUser FROM XBOLTDLM.CTI_TO_E_CALLBACK A JOIN XBOLTDLM.CC_USER_STS C ON A.AgentID = C.TelNum LEFT JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_MEMBER B ON A.TelNum = B.TelNum OR A.TelNum = B.MTelNum WHERE A.AgentID = #{AgentID} AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM XBOLTDLM.CALLBACK_MST M WHERE M.CallBackKey = A.CallBackKey );

INSERT INTO XBOLTDLM.CALLBACK_DTL ( CallBackKey, Seq, CallYn, CallRet, Memo, DelYn, VoiceFile, CreationTime, Creator, LastUpdated, LastUser ) SELECT CAST(A.CallBackKey AS VARCHAR(20)), ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY A.CallBackKey ORDER BY A.CallBackKey, A.RegDate) AS Seq, 'N' AS CallYn, COALESCE(A.CallRet, '02') AS CallRet, A.Memo, 'N' AS DelYn, A.VoiceFile, CONVERT(DATETIME, A.RegDate, 112) AS CreationTime, C.CC_USR_EMP_NO AS Creator, CONVERT(DATETIME, A.RegDate, 112) AS LastUpdated, C.CC_USR_EMP_NO AS LastUser FROM XBOLTDLM.CTI_TO_E_CALLBACK A JOIN XBOLTDLM.CC_USER_STS C ON A.AgentID = C.TelNum LEFT JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_MEMBER B ON A.TelNum = B.TelNum OR A.TelNum = B.MTelNum WHERE A.AgentID = #{AgentID} AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM XBOLTDLM.CALLBACK_DTL D WHERE D.CallBackKey = A.CallBackKey AND D.Seq = 1 );
mapper.select: WITH RankedData AS ( SELECT M.CallBackKey, FORMAT(CONVERT(DATETIME, M.Regdate + ' ' + STUFF(STUFF(M.regtime, 3, 0, ':'), 6, 0, ':'), 120), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss') AS RegDayTime, M.ReqNm, D.Seq, CONVERT(VARCHAR, D.CreationTime , 120) AS CreationTime, M.AgentID, B.CC_USER_NAME AS NAME, D.Memo, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY M.CallBackKey ORDER BY D.Seq DESC) AS RowNum FROM XBOLTDLM.CALLBACK_MST M LEFT JOIN XBOLTDLM.CALLBACK_DTL D ON M.CallBackKey = D.CallBackKey LEFT JOIN XBOLTDLM.CC_USER_STS B ON M.AgentID = B.TelNum WHERE M.DelYn = 'N' AND M.CallRet IN ('00', '02') AND M.AgentID = #{AgentID} ) SELECT CallBackKey, RegDayTime, ReqNm, Seq, CreationTime, AgentID, NAME, Memo FROM RankedData WHERE RowNum = 1 ORDER BY CreationTime DESC;

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY m.CallBackKey, d.Seq ASC) AS no, d.CallBackKey, d.Seq, m.ReqNum AS ReqNum, CONVERT(VARCHAR, d.CreationTime , 120) as RegDayTime, CONVERT(VARCHAR, d.LastUpdated , 120) AS LastUpdated, b.CC_USER_NAME AS AgentNm, d.CallRet, CASE WHEN d.CallRet = '01' THEN '통화성공' WHEN d.CallRet = '02' THEN '통화실패' WHEN d.CallRet = '03' THEN '콜백포기' ELSE '실패' END AS CallRetNm, d.Memo FROM XBOLTDLM.CALLBACK_MST m JOIN XBOLTDLM.CALLBACK_DTL d ON m.CallBackKey = d.CallBackKey LEFT JOIN XBOLTDLM.CC_USER_STS b ON d.LastUser = b.CC_USR_EMP_NO WHERE d.CallBackKey = #{CallBackKey} ORDER BY m.CallBackKey, d.Seq DESC;
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO XBOLTDLM.CALLBACK_DTL ( CallBackKey, Seq, CallYn, CallRet, Memo, DelYn, VoiceFile, CreationTime, Creator, LastUpdated, LastUser ) VALUES ( #{CallBackKey}, (SELECT ISNULL(MAX(Seq), 0) + 1 FROM XBOLTDLM.CALLBACK_DTL WHERE CallBackKey = #{CallBackKey}), 'N', #{CallRet}, #{Memo}, 'N', NULL, #{CreationTime}, #{Creator}, GETDATE(), #{LastUser} );
mapper.select: SELECT CC_USER_NAME AS NAME, TelNum AS CODE FROM XBOLTDLM.CC_USER_STS WHERE 1=1 AND useYN ='Y' AND CC_USR_EMP_NO = #{CC_USR_EMP_NO} ORDER BY MOD_DATE DESC;
